You can view the relevant section in the manual here: [UR3e manual p. 92](http://localhost:8091/submodels/dXJuOnN1Ym1vZGVsOnVyM2U6dHlwZTpoYW5kb3ZlcmRvY3VtZW50YXRpb24/submodel-elements/Documents%5B0%5D.DocumentVersions%5B0%5D.DigitalFiles%5B0%5D/attachment#page=92)
